name: Green Beans with Bacon Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle of boiling salted water, cook the beans until al dente, about 3 minutes.
2. Drain the beans in a colander and plunge into a bowl of ice and cold water to stop cooking. Drain the beans well.
3. In a large heavy skillet, cook the bacon over moderate heat until crisp and transfer to paper towels to drain. Crumble the bacon.
4. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon fat from the skillet. Add the beans with vinegar and half of the bacon, and cook over moderate heat, tossing, until tender. Season the beans with salt and pepper and serve topped with remaining bacon.
